subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto her who believed in her Lord when He appeared once again, that she might sever herself from those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله الی التی آمنت بربها اذا ظهر مره اخری لتنقطعی عن الذینهم
